message:
fix(db): replace unreachable!() with error return in coalesce joiner on leader panic

When the leader thread panics while holding the Slot mutex, the mutex
is poisoned. Joiner threads recover the guard via PoisonError::into_inner,
but the slot state is still Pending (the leader never set it to Ready/Failed).

Previously: unreachable!() on Pending state → cascading panic in ALL
joiner threads, taking down every concurrent request coalesced on that key.

Now: returns LeaderFailed error so joiners can fall back to independent
execution instead of panicking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
